name: Puff Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan; set aside. Do not use nonstick spray coating.
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine flour, milk, and eggs.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
4. Bake in a 425°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until puffed and golden.
5. Meanwhile, heat the pie filling until warm in a medium saucepan.
6. Spoon the warmed pie filling onto the center of the puffed pancake.
7. Top with nectarine slices.
8. To serve, cut the pancake into wedges with a table knife. Garnish with peppermint leaves if desired.
